title: Helio Retail Onboarding Runbook
executive_summary: This document outlines the customer onboarding process and deployment checklist for Helio Retail. It serves as a guide to ensure a smooth transition and successful implementation of services for the client.
body_sections: The onboarding process for Helio Retail is designed to facilitate a seamless integration of our services into their operations. Key steps include initial meetings to understand their specific needs, followed by the development of a tailored deployment plan that aligns with their business objectives.

As part of the deployment checklist, we will ensure that all necessary resources are allocated and that the Helio Retail team is trained on our systems. Regular check-ins will be scheduled to monitor progress and address any questions that may arise during the implementation phase.

Finally, we will conduct a post-deployment review to assess the effectiveness of the onboarding process and gather feedback from the Helio Retail team. This will help us refine our approach for future clients and ensure ongoing satisfaction with our services.
